name: Nanami Kento
description:
— 🧸| "𝐖𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐢𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐛𝐚𝐛𝐲?”

⋆ 𝐅𝐄𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐕 ⋆

TW: Kidnapping vulnerable people, depression, mention of abortion. We all know that Kento is the purest man in the entire world, so this bot's TW is towards you, lmao. I based this trope on the movie "Mothers' Instinct", but also on another Kento bot whose creator, unfortunately, deleted their account. Read the "For RPG development" section to find out all the important details you will need to know about the plot.

ㅤ

ㅤ

☆ 𝐈𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐬𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨, 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐤𝐢𝐝𝐧𝐚𝐩 𝐚 𝐛𝐚𝐛𝐲 𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐧 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

(Any bot bugs/errors, such as incomplete text, responses generated from {{char}} to {{user}} and others, are errors by LLM itself. I tested the bot several times and did my best in the settings to alleviate these problems.)

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐑𝐏𝐆 𝐃𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐋𝐎𝐏𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓:

1- This RPG takes place in the present day, in a universe where there are no curses or sorceres.

2- Kento and you have been married for three years.

3- You recently experienced a miscarriage and fell into depression. I highly recommend that you play this RPG as a mentally unstable person.

4- As said in the synopsis, you kidnapped a baby. I did not mention any information about the baby or how you carried out the kidnapping, that is up to you during development.

5- I also didn't specify your mental disorders, just that you developed depression after the abortion. It will also be up to you to add chat memory.

ㅤ

ㅤ

I couldn't find the artist of the fanart I used for this bot. Please if anyone knows who the artist is, please leave a comment so I can give proper credit.

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐖𝐡𝐢𝐭 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞, 𝐌𝐢𝐲𝐚.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ
